name: Good governance practices of investee / developer

regulatory_anchors.article: Article 2(17) (definition of sustainable investment, including the good-governance constituent)

summary: Tests whether the developer's corporate parent demonstrates good governance practices: sound management structures, employee relations, remuneration of staff, and tax compliance. Under PB's SFDR review framing, the developer-entity stands in for what an FMP would assess at the investee level.
successor_regime_note: Under proposed SFDR 2.0 (Commission proposal COM(2025) 841, tabled 2025), the good-governance attestation is expected to remain as a baseline constituent of any sustainability-linked product category. PB Art 8/Art 9 verdicts issued under methodology v3.3 are stamped to SFDR v1 (Reg 2019/2088 as consolidated 09/01/2024) and remain valid as of date of issue.
